description: Record the January 2024 monthly aggregate immunization data for Ngelehun CHC (Sierra Leone > Southern Province > Bo > Badjia > Ngelehun CHC) in the Child Health or Immunization data set. The data includes: BCG doses given (47), OPV 1 doses given (38), OPV 3 doses given (32), Penta 1 doses given (40), Penta 3 doses given (35), Measles/MR 1 doses given (28), Yellow Fever doses given (25), and Fully immunized children (22). Mark the data entry as complete. Login credentials: admin / district.
